distribution.public_payload: derived 84x112 class maps, support masks, strategy levels, and resized dense Farneback flow only; no source RGB or scorer weights
distribution.release_gate: CLEARED by the operator/publication-owner declaration dated 2026-07-09; attribution and source custody remain required.
distribution.source_repository_license: MIT file present at upstream/LICENSE; exact bytes locked in technical_custody

frames.proof: upstream seq_len=2 and AVVideoDataset consumes non-overlapping two-frame sequences; gt_f0/gt_f1 are the two frames of this single pair

metric_semantics.not_a_score: No value in this manifest is d_seg, d_pose, the comma.ai composite, PSNR, or a paper-reported result.
metric_semantics.refresh_pressure: max(label disagreement, boundary-set disagreement, holes, collisions); continuous display/control construction

technical_custody.excluded_asset_finding: Manim ego_idx advances pair indices while using gt_f1 only, so adjacent entries are raw-frame stride 2; those flow/argmax assets are technically locked but intentionally not used for a consecutive-frame claim.
technical_custody.source_cache_arrays: gt_f0/gt_f1 real decoded consecutive pair frames; lstars frozen SegNet argmax for gt_f1; margins top1-top2 gap; gt_poses frozen PoseNet first-six outputs

title: Temporal strategy transport on one real consecutive raw-frame pair

transport.categorical_warp: forward nearest splat; row-major first contributor wins; holes and many-to-one collisions remain explicit
transport.dense_display_field: dense 448x336 flow bilinearly resized and displacement-scaled to the display grid
transport.estimator: OpenCV calcOpticalFlowFarneback run directly between gt_f0 and gt_f1 of one pair at 448x336
limitations: Farneback is an advisory image-space estimate, not PoseNet, xi, camera motion, or ground-truth flow.
The [1,4,12] bank and boundary/annulus/interior map are a geometric construction, not a fitted STAC table bank.
This does not implement STAC temporal DIS flow, its PSNR trigger, or its experiment.
transport.receiver: transport compact uint8 strategy levels, then index receiver-held [1,4,12] table bank exactly
